data.title: Kuros Bioscience reports 1H results
data.description:
• Kuros Bioscience press release (OTCPK:CSBTF): 1H Kuros Medical Devices segment sales increased 148% to CHF 31.8 million from CHF 12.9 million
  • EPS loss of CHF0.01

data.title: AirSculpt Technologies CEO Todd Magazine steps down
data.description:
• AirSculpt Technologies (NASDAQ:AIRS) said its CEO, Todd Magazine, has stepped down from his role.
  • The firm said its CFO, Dennis Dean, will helm the company on an interim basis, until a permanent successor is named.

data.title: Minerva S.A. reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Minerva S.A. press release (OTCPK:MRVSY): Q2 consolidated gross revenue in the second quarter of 2024 was R$ 8.2 billion
  • Net revenue was R$ 7.7 billion in the period, up by 6.7% on the previous quarter, and 5.4% up year on year.
  • EBITDA was R$ 744.6 million, with an EBITDA margin of 9.7%, up by 18.4% on the previous quarter.

data.title: Cineplex GAAP EPS of -C$0.33, revenue of C$277.34M
data.description:
• Cineplex press release (OTCPK:CPXGF): Q2 GAAP EPS of -C$0.33.
  • Revenue of C$277.34M (-24.6% Y/Y).
  • Delivered BPP of C$13.11 and CPP of C$9.56, both all-time quarterly records.
  • Cinema media revenue increased 4.0% over the prior year despite lower attendance.

data.title: Structure Therapeutics reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Structure Therapeutics press release (NASDAQ:GPCR): Q2 Net loss for the second quarter of 2024 totaled $26.0 million,
  • Cash, cash equivalents and short-term investments totaled $927.1 million on June 30, 2024.

data.title: Embecta beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; updates FY24 outlook
data.description:
• Embecta press release (NASDAQ:EMBC): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.74 beats by $0.28.
  • Revenue of $272.5M (-4.8% Y/Y) beats by $5.06M.
  • Adjusted EBITDA and margin of $99.2 million and 36.4%, compared to $92.2 million and 32.2% in the prior year period.

  • Fiscal Year 2024 Updated Financial Guidance:For fiscal year 2024, the Company now expects:

data.title: AtkinsRéalis reports mixed Q2 results; updates FY24 guidance
data.description:
• AtkinsRéalis press release (OTCPK:SNCAF): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.49.
  • Revenue of C$2.36B (+10.8% Y/Y).
  • Net cash used for operating activities of C$88.7 million.
  • Net limited recourse and recourse debt to Adjusted EBITDA ratio was 1.9 as at June 30, 2024 compared to 3.1 as at June 30, 2023.

  • 2024 Outlook

    The Company is raising its Nuclear organic revenue growth outlook for full year 2024 compared to 2023 to between 30% and 35%, from the previous range of between 15% and 20%, reflecting strong growth to date and confidence in continued demand, supported by a strong backlog.

    The Company is adjusting its Nuclear Segment Adjusted EBIT to segment revenue ratio outlook for full year 2024 to between 12% and 14%, from the previous range of between 13% and 15%, reflective of the 2024 business mix and in line with the Company's long-term target introduced at the Investor Day on June 13, 2024.

data.title: Gravity GAAP ADS of $1.31, revenue of $89.33M
data.description:
• Gravity press release (NASDAQ:GRVY): Q2 GAAP ADS of $1.31.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser declares $0.20 dividend
data.description:
• Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) declares $0.20/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 2.57%
  • Payable Sept. 13; for shareholders of record Aug. 30; ex-div Aug. 30.

  • “Under Weyerhaeuser's cash return framework, the company expects to supplement its quarterly base cash dividend, as appropriate, with an additional return of variable cash to achieve a targeted total return to shareholders of 75% to 80% of annual Adjusted Funds Available for Distribution (Adjusted FAD),” the company said.

  • See WY Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.
